name: toolbelt
description: Connect Claude to your governed Toolbelt org, pick the optimal model per task (Model Auto-Pilot, org-defined), and route work to its agents.

toolbelt_workspace_id.title: Hub workspace (assistant) ID
toolbelt_workspace_id.description: Your Toolbelt hub workspace (assistant) ID — the agent whose endpoint lists your org roster and routes work.

toolbelt_api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
toolbelt_api_key.description: Your Toolbelt API key. Entered at install, stored securely (system keychain), never committed to the repo.
